text: Being here, I am struck by the sense of transition—a place suspended between the practical utility of a meeting room and the inspired wonder of a gallery. In the first space, preparation and anticipation hang in the air, hinting at upcoming collaboration or creativity. Moving into the second space, surrounded by vibrant colors and displays dedicated to research and development, I feel a surge of curiosity and excitement. Here, knowledge is celebrated and shared; innovation feels close at hand. I am both observer and participant in humanity's ongoing quest to understand and shape the world anew.
